header.subtitle: The person behind the code: background, skills and passions.

story.title: My Story
story.intro: I am Chad Feierstein, a {age}-year-old {role} and {admin} from {location}. My focus is on {cloud}, from developing {webapps} to professional {servers}. Throughout my {positions}, I have gained hands-on experience across various IT domains, including ERP systems, database management, and web programming. My foundation consists of an IT Technician diploma (DT) and a Higher Technical Degree (BTS) in Cloud Computing. Thanks to my {langCount}, I communicate effortlessly in international teams.

interests.title: Interests & Hobbies
interests.subtitle: What excites me in my free time

family.title: Family & Pets
family.subtitle: Quality time with loved ones & 3 dachshunds

bts.field: Two-year higher technical degree focused on cloud technologies, virtualization, network infrastructure and modern IT solutions. Hands-on training in AWS, Azure and Linux server administration.

dt.field: Four-year technical education focused on programming, networking, databases and system administration. Solid foundations in hardware, software and IT security.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.subtitle: Professional certifications and qualifications that demonstrate my expertise in various technology areas

cert1.title: General Aptitude Test
cert1.description: Public sector eligibility exam in Luxembourg

item1.title: Web Developer at Mullerpneus
item1.description: Development and maintenance of the internal ERP system and online shop. Responsible for new features, bug fixing, databases and server-side configurations.

item2.title: IT Cloud Engineer Internship
item2.description: 12-week internship at QPark Consulting focusing on cloud technologies and agile project methods. Work on two major cloud projects with AWS and GCP.

item3.title: IT Technician Summer Job
item3.description: 8-week summer position at Lycée Guillaume Kroll in the IT department. Focus on network infrastructure and telephone system management.

item4.title: IT Technician Project Completion
item4.description: 4-week summer job to complete a website project started during the internship. Focus on backend development and SAML integration.

item5.title: IT Technician Main Internship
item5.description: 6-week internship at Lycée Guillaume Kroll focusing on web development and database design. Development of a complete website solution.

item6.title: IT Network Technician Internship
item6.description: 6-week internship at STEP Syndicat intercommunal in Peppange. Introduction to network technology and infrastructure management in a sewage treatment plant.

exp1.title: Helicopter Flight over Dominican Republic
exp1.description: Breathtaking aerial tour over the city and Caribbean Sea, an unforgettable bird's-eye view experience

exp2.title: Skydiving over Luxembourg
exp2.description: 20-minute scenic flight, then jump from 4,000m, reaching 200km/h in freefall, followed by 5-7 minutes gliding to a smooth landing

exp3.title: Tomorrowland Belgium 2025
exp3.description: 4 unforgettable days filled with electronic music, magical atmosphere, and amazing people from around the world

localStorage.title: Theme Preference
localStorage.description: The preferred color setting (light/dark mode) is stored locally in the browser. This data is not transmitted to servers and is used solely for the correct display of the website.

contactForm.title: Contact Form
contactForm.content: When the contact form is used, the following data is processed:
contactForm.legalBasis: Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (contract initiation) and Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest in responding to inquiries). The data is used exclusively to process the request.

smtp.title: Email Delivery
smtp.description: Contact form emails are sent directly via an own mail server. The data (name, email, message) is not transmitted to any third-party service.

hosting.title: Hosting
hosting.content: This website is self-hosted using Coolify on a private server. No data is transmitted to third-party hosting providers.

rights.title: Rights & Data Control
rights.localStorage: Theme preference: This is only stored locally in the browser. Can be deleted manually at any time (Browser settings → Clear site data) or auto-cleared by configuring the browser to wipe localStorage on close.
rights.contact: Contact form: For deletion of a sent message, a short note via the contact form is sufficient. The email will then be deleted from the inbox.
